weight_transform: none: coefficients are passed as a plain Python list of scalars in highest-degree-first order (Horner ordering), exactly as they appear sequentially in the torch mul/add chain. No tensor weights to transform.
applicability_notes: constraints: {'coeffs': 'non-empty list of float scalars; ordering is highest-degree coefficient first', 'input': 'single activation tensor; chain must be strictly alternating (acc * x + c) with the same input tensor x at every multiply'}

placement_observations.size_descriptor: generic test shapes, values in [-100, 100], TILE_LAYOUT
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_input_tensor, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory_config; no explicit memory_config passed to polyval
unit test: output memory_config not specified, defaults to DRAM interleaved
